/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/trt_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/face_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/face_embedder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/gst_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/token_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/enroll_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frs_runner.dir/src/runner.cpp.o -o frs_runner  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer_plugin.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvonnxparser.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcuda /usr/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 -lpthread /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed
